project.title: SAIL Multi-Plant Digital Twin for Hot-Rolled Coil Emissions
project.reporting_entity: Steel Authority of India (SAIL) multi-plant export network
selection_rationale: The model expands the previous single-corridor demo into a plant-aware SAIL network with four integrated plants.
Each plant is paired with three authored supplier scenarios so the twin can simulate sourcing tradeoffs instead of a single fixed inbound leg.
Coordinates are intentionally approximate public reference points to emphasize geographic spread while keeping the simulation transparent about inference quality.

sources.title: SAIL Plants Overview
supports: Bhilai, Bokaro, Rourkela, and Durgapur plant grounding

sources.title: Bhilai Steel Plant | SAIL
supports: Bhilai steel plant location and integrated role

sources.title: Mines | SAIL
supports: Rowghat, Barsua, Kalta, Bolani, Kiriburu, Meghahatuburu, and Gua mine references

sources.title: RMD and Collieries | SAIL
supports: Plant-to-mine pairing is an engineering inference across the captive mine network

sources.title: Jawaharlal Nehru Port Trust (JNPT)
supports: Primary western export gateway for all SAIL steel plants

sources.title: CEA CO2 Baseline Database for the Indian Power Sector - Version 19
supports: Indian grid emission factor used for Scope 2

bhilai.label: Bhilai Steel Plant
bhilai.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Bhilai steel cluster
bhilai.technology_note: Bhilai is modeled as a legacy but large integrated BF-BOF route with higher fuel intensity than the eastern plants.

bokaro.label: Bokaro Steel Plant
bokaro.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Bokaro steel cluster
bokaro.technology_note: Bokaro is modeled as a relatively efficient flat-product route with strong rail connectivity toward the eastern port system.

rourkela.label: Rourkela Steel Plant
rourkela.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Rourkela steel cluster
rourkela.technology_note: Rourkela is modeled as the lowest-intensity plant in this v1 SAIL twin because of shorter mine corridors and a slightly tighter process-energy envelope.

durgapur.label: Durgapur Steel Plant
durgapur.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Durgapur steel cluster
durgapur.technology_note: Durgapur is modeled as a higher-distance eastern export network because its selected mine basket sits farther west than the port leg.

rowghat.label: Rowghat Iron Ore Mine
rowghat.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Rowghat mining cluster
rowghat.supplier_emission_story: Rowghat is modeled as a comparatively efficient mine-to-plant source for Bhilai thanks to a shorter central India corridor.
rowghat.inference_note: Mine-level CO2 intensity is an engineering estimate based on Indian iron ore mining practice; public SAIL pages do not publish cradle-to-gate mine emission factors.

dalli_rajhara.label: Dalli Rajhara Iron Ore Complex
dalli_rajhara.location_description: Dalli Rajhara mining belt serving central India steelmaking
dalli_rajhara.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Dalli Rajhara mining cluster
dalli_rajhara.supplier_emission_story: Dalli Rajhara is modeled as a shorter-haul but more diesel-heavy source than Rowghat.
dalli_rajhara.inference_note: The dispatch profile is inferred from a mature mine-to-plant corridor rather than a published mine-specific dispatch mix.

barsua.label: Barsua Iron Ore Mine
barsua.location_description: Barsua mining cluster in the Odisha mineral belt
barsua.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Barsua mining cluster
barsua.supplier_emission_story: Barsua is modeled as a lower-emission rail-led supplier in the eastern mineral belt.
barsua.inference_note: Public SAIL sources identify Barsua as a captive mine but do not publish a mine-specific carbon intensity.

kalta.label: Kalta Iron Ore Mine
kalta.location_description: Kalta mine cluster near the Rourkela raw-materials network
kalta.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Kalta mining cluster
kalta.supplier_emission_story: Kalta is modeled as the tightest Rourkela inbound corridor in this catalog.
kalta.inference_note: The lower factor is an engineering inference from a shorter corridor and rail-dominant dispatch assumption.

bolani.label: Bolani Iron Ore Mine
bolani.location_description: Bolani ore belt in northern Odisha
bolani.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Bolani mining cluster
bolani.supplier_emission_story: Bolani is modeled as a medium-distance eastern source with balanced mine energy intensity.
bolani.inference_note: The transport profile is inferred from geography and rail-heavy captive-mine logistics.

kiriburu.label: Kiriburu Iron Ore Mine
kiriburu.location_description: Kiriburu mining cluster in the Singhbhum belt
kiriburu.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Kiriburu mining cluster
kiriburu.supplier_emission_story: Kiriburu is modeled as a benchmark low-emission source for Bokaro and Durgapur due to rail-linked eastern dispatch.
kiriburu.inference_note: The lower dispatch factor is inferred from geography and the broader SAIL raw-materials network.

meghahatuburu.label: Meghahatuburu Iron Ore Mine
meghahatuburu.location_description: Meghahatuburu mining belt in the Singhbhum iron ore range
meghahatuburu.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Meghahatuburu mining cluster
meghahatuburu.supplier_emission_story: Meghahatuburu is modeled as a balanced eastern source with slightly higher mine energy intensity than Kiriburu.
meghahatuburu.inference_note: Mine-specific carbon values are not publicly disclosed; the scenario uses an engineering estimate.

gua.label: Gua Iron Ore Mine
gua.location_description: Gua mine cluster in the Singhbhum range
gua.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for the Gua mining cluster
gua.supplier_emission_story: Gua is modeled as the higher-distance Bokaro option with moderate mine energy demand.
gua.inference_note: The dispatch and carbon factors are engineering assumptions built for scenario comparison rather than official mine disclosures.

jnpt.label: Jawaharlal Nehru Port (JNPT Mumbai)
jnpt.location_description: India's largest container port on the western coast, near Navi Mumbai
jnpt.coordinate_quality: Approximate public coordinate for JNPT container terminal
jnpt.terminal_reference: Primary western export gateway for SAIL steel products

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Rowghat to Bhilai
plantSupplierScenarios.story: Lower-distance central India corridor with comparatively stable inbound emissions.

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Dalli Rajhara to Bhilai
plantSupplierScenarios.story: Short-haul alternative with higher mine diesel intensity than the Rowghat path.

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Barsua to Bhilai
plantSupplierScenarios.story: A farther eastern sourcing option that increases realism and supply complexity for Bhilai.

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Kiriburu to Bokaro
plantSupplierScenarios.story: Benchmark eastern rail corridor with the lowest modeled upstream intensity for Bokaro.

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Meghahatuburu to Bokaro
plantSupplierScenarios.story: Balanced eastern route with slightly higher mine energy use than Kiriburu.

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Gua to Bokaro
plantSupplierScenarios.story: Higher-distance inbound corridor that creates a useful comparison against the tighter Singhbhum suppliers.

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Barsua to Rourkela
plantSupplierScenarios.story: Short eastern raw-material corridor with lower modeled dispatch emissions.

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Kalta to Rourkela
plantSupplierScenarios.story: Tightest inbound corridor for Rourkela and the expected low-carbon benchmark in this plant basket.

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Bolani to Rourkela
plantSupplierScenarios.story: Moderate-distance Odisha route that broadens the plant's supplier spread.

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Kiriburu to Durgapur
plantSupplierScenarios.story: Efficient eastern source with a long but rail-friendly inbound corridor.

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Meghahatuburu to Durgapur
plantSupplierScenarios.story: Similar to Kiriburu but with slightly higher mine energy intensity and a marginally longer path.

plantSupplierScenarios.label: Barsua to Durgapur
plantSupplierScenarios.story: A farther Odisha source that improves geographic spread and creates a more demanding inbound network.

factors.distance_method: Great-circle distance multiplied by a corridor factor to approximate rail and road routing.
